channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Are Flat Minima an Illusion?
item.description: Paper challenges flat minima theory, proposing reparameterization-invariant "weakness" as true driver of neural network generalization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Nationwide EHR-Based Chronic Rhinosinusitis Prediction Using Demographic-Stratified Models
item.description: Nationwide EHR-based models with demographic stratification achieved 0.8461 AUC for predicting chronic rhinosinusitis diagnosis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SAT: Sequential Agent Tuning for Coordinator Free Plug and Play Multi-LLM Training with Monotonic Improvement Guarantees
item.description: SAT enables coordinator-free training of multiple smaller LLMs with monotonic improvement and plug-and-play agent swapping capabilities.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Physics-Informed Neural Networks with Learnable Loss Balancing and Transfer Learning
item.description: Framework introduces learnable loss balancing in PINNs to adaptively combine physics and data supervision for improved performance with limited data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Horizon-Constrained Rashomon Sets for Chaotic Forecasting
item.description: Research bridges predictive multiplicity and chaos theory, introducing horizon-constrained Rashomon sets that improve decision-making in chaotic forecasting systems by 18-34%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Sparse Prefix Caching for Hybrid and Recurrent LLM Serving
item.description: Sparse prefix caching stores recurrent LLM states at checkpoints rather than per-token positions, reducing serving latency for shared-prefix requests.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MidSteer: Optimal Affine Framework for Steering Generative Models
item.description: Researchers formalize concept steering theory and propose MidSteer, an affine framework for manipulating generative model representations with minimal disturbance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Data-Driven Variational Basis Learning Beyond Neural Networks: A Non-Neural Framework for Adaptive Basis Discovery
item.description: DVBL, a non-neural framework, learns data-adaptive basis functions through variational optimization while maintaining interpretability and mathematical transparency versus neural networks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Adaptive Computation Depth via Learned Token Routing in Transformers
item.description: Adaptive Computation Depth via Learned Token Routing in Transformers

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Structural Instability of Feature Composition
item.description: Structural Instability of Feature Composition

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Channel-Level Semantic Perturbations: Unlearnable Examples for Diverse Training Paradigms
item.description: Channel-Level Semantic Perturbations: Unlearnable Examples for Diverse Training Paradigms

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MACS: Modality-Aware Capacity Scaling for Efficient Multimodal MoE Inference
item.description: MACS: Modality-Aware Capacity Scaling for Efficient Multimodal MoE Inference

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Internalizing Outcome Supervision into Process Supervision: A New Paradigm for Reinforcement Learning for Reasoning
item.description: Internalizing Outcome Supervision into Process Supervision: A New Paradigm for Reinforcement Learning for Reasoning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Rethinking Data Curation in LLM Training: Online Reweighting Offers Better Generalization than Offline Methods
item.description: Rethinking Data Curation in LLM Training: Online Reweighting Offers Better Generalization than Offline Methods

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Evolutionary fine tuning of quantized convolution-based deep learning models
item.description: Evolutionary fine tuning of quantized convolution-based deep learning models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Expert Routing for Communication-Efficient MoE via Finite Expert Banks
item.description: Expert Routing for Communication-Efficient MoE via Finite Expert Banks

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Forecasting Green Skill Demand in the Automotive Industry: Evidence from Online Job Postings
item.description: Forecasting Green Skill Demand in the Automotive Industry: Evidence from Online Job Postings

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Attribution-Guided Continual Learning for Large Language Models
item.description: Attribution-Guided Continual Learning for Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Graph Normalization: Fast Binarizing Dynamics for Differentiable MWIS
item.description: Graph Normalization: Fast Binarizing Dynamics for Differentiable MWIS

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Feature Starvation as Geometric Instability in Sparse Autoencoders
item.description: Feature Starvation as Geometric Instability in Sparse Autoencoders

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Multi-Head Attention Approach for SLA Compliance Monitoring in Data Centers
item.description: A Multi-Head Attention Approach for SLA Compliance Monitoring in Data Centers

item.description: Balancing Stability and Plasticity in Sequentially Trained Early-Exiting Neural Networks

item.description: COPYCOP: Ownership Verification for Graph Neural Networks

item.description: SPADE: Faster Drug Discovery by Learning from Sparse Data

item.description: Neural Co-state Policies: Structuring Hidden States in Recurrent Reinforcement Learning

item.description: Conditional Diffusion Under Linear Constraints: Langevin Mixing and Information-Theoretic Guarantees
